name: context-autopilot
description: Mines your Claude Code and Cursor sessions into evidence-based CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md rules you approve.
long_description: Automated context collection for coding agents. Context Autopilot mines your real agent session history for repeated instructions, corrections, and rejected actions, then distills them into CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md rules — with your own past messages as evidence. Includes global mode (cross-project rules about how you work), staleness detection, and in-chat approval. 100% local, zero dependencies, no API key required.
